prestazioni: Engine: S14B23 (2.3L inline-4) bored to 2.5L with Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (87mm bore, 9.5:1 CR), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a custom Schrick 284° camshaft grind for high-RPM power (8,500 RPM redline). Paired with a custom 4-2-1 stainless steel header by Supersprint and a 3.5-inch titanium exhaust system with a straight-pipe design by Remus, terminating in a 4-inch carbon-fiber tip.

Forced Induction: Single-turbo setup using a Garrett GT35R (62mm compressor, .82 A/R turbine housing) with a custom cast manifold by Turbonetics, feeding into a custom air-to-water intercooler by Bell Intercoolers (front-mount, 12x12x3.5-inch core). Boost controlled via a TurboSmart HyperGate45 wastegate (15psi base, adjustable to 22psi) and a Pierburg fuel pump (255 L/hr) with dual Bosch 044 high-flow injectors (850cc/min).

Drivetrain: Getrag 265 5-speed dogleg transmission with a 2.93:1 final drive ratio, reinforced with a Quaife ATB differential (40% lockup) and a Sachs Performance twin-disc clutch (240mm, 800Nm torque capacity). Custom half-shafts by GKN Driveline with CV joints rated for 600Nm, paired with a lightweight aluminum driveshaft by The Driveshaft Shop.
estetica: Body: Full carbon-fiber widebody conversion using the authentic BMW E30 M3 Sport Evolution III fender flares (OEM-spec, 40mm wider than stock) with a custom Rocket Bunny front bumper (E30-specific, 3-piece design) and a rear diffuser by Vorsteiner (carbon-fiber, 3-piece). Hood replaced with a carbon-fiber unit by Seibon (OEM-style, 30% lighter) featuring a functional NACA duct for intercooler airflow.

Aero: Custom front splitter by APR Performance (3D carbon-fiber, 3-inch overhang) with a 20mm adjustable canard kit by VMR Wheels. Rear wing is a custom 9 Lives Racing GT wing (carbon-fiber, 1,800mm span, 300mm chord) mounted on aluminum pedestals with 50mm adjustability. Underbody features a full flat floor by APR (aluminum, 2mm thickness) with a rear diffuser extension by RW Carbon (carbon-fiber, 4 strakes).

Wheels & Stance: BBS LM-R wheels (16x9 ET15 front, 16x10 ET5 rear) with custom center-lock adapters by Weld Racing, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (225/45/16 front, 255/40/16 rear). Suspension is a full Ohlins Road & Track coilover kit (E30-specific, 2-way adjustable dampers, 30mm drop) with custom polyurethane bushings by Powerflex (80A durometer) and a 25mm rear sway bar by Hotchkis.
